scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client" "npm run desktop:dev --workspace client"
scripts.db:setup: npm run prisma:generate --workspace server && npx prisma db push --schema server/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run prisma:seed --workspace server
